Flashcard App

Base UI placeholder

This is the base page. Backend storage functions are implemented; UI and API routes will be added in later subtasks.

Server runs on port 7995.

# Flashcard App (Base)

Minimal Express server scaffold for a simple Flashcard app. This subtask implements a Flashcard model and JSON file storage with CRUD helpers.

Tech
- Express (port 7995)
- Node.js (CommonJS)
- Jest for tests

Storage
- Flashcard model: { id, front, back }
- Data is stored in JSON at data/cards.json.
- Atomic writes are used: write to a temp file and rename to avoid partial writes.
- Validation ensures front/back are non-empty strings.

Environment
- Set FLASHCARD_DATA_DIR to change where data is stored (default: ./data).

Scripts
- Install: npm install
- Run dev: npm run dev
- Run prod: npm start
- Test: npm test

Notes
- The UI and API routes for flashcard CRUD will be added in later subtasks.

notes: Storage module honors FLASHCARD_DATA_DIR for testability and custom data location.
data/cards.json is created on first write via atomic write in lib/storage.js.
Run tests with npm test. All CRUD operations are covered.
